violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was blocked by a mop bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The mop bucket was moved from in front of the sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was blocked by a mop bucket and debris within the basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The mop bucket was moved, and debris was removed from inside the sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Sanitizer container was observed empty and needed to be replaced and establishment does not have replacement sanitizer. Sanitizing sink was prepared with chlorine bleach to 100ppm and inspector left test strips for staff. Establishment is to order more sanitizer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The deli display case was observed held at an ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within unit had been placed into unit less than 4 hours prior to inspection and were moved to freezer to rapidly cool and then will be held in 2-door reach-in unit in back storage area. Establishment is not to store TCS foods inside of unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The cutting board on the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink in the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024
